notableEvents.label: Yordan Alvarez grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Yordan Alvarez hits a grand slam (22) to right field. Taylor Trammell scores. Christian Vázquez scores. Jeremy Peña scores.

notableEvents.label: Jake Meyers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Meyers grounds into a double play, shortstop Darell Hernaiz to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Taylor Trammell out at 2nd. Jake Meyers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jeremy Peña reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jeremy Peña reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Darell Hernaiz. Jeremy Peña to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Collin Price pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Collin Price flies out to center fielder Henry Bolte.

notableEvents.label: Henry Bolte plunked
notableEvents.detail: Henry Bolte hit by pitch. Tyler Soderstrom to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jeremy Peña reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Darell Hernaiz. Jeremy Peña to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jeremy Peña reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Darell Hernaiz. Jeremy Peña to 2nd.
